business.name: Astros Playland & Cafe
business.address: 140 E Rawson Ave Suite 116, Oak Creek, WI 53154
business.description: Oak Creek's premier space-themed indoor playground and family cafe. An intergalactic adventure designed for curious explorers aged 1-12.
business.status: Party room bookings are open now. General walk-in admission is coming soon — currently by booking only.

admission.adults: 2 adults FREE per play pass. Additional adults $4.99 each.
admission.socks: $3.99 Astro socks required for all guests (can be purchased at front desk)
admission.waiver: Required for all participants — sign online at https://waiver.roller.app/astrosplaylandandcafe or at the front desk

membership.includes: Unlimited visits, cafe discounts, buddy pass (bring a friend twice per month — valid after 1 month of membership)

rooms: Galaxy Party Room (planets and galaxy theme)
partyPackages.capacity: Up to 30 guests (kids + adults) per room
includes: 2 party pizzas (choice of cheese, veggie, or beef)
partyPackages.outsideFood: Birthday cake only — no other outside food or drinks permitted
partyPackages.cancellation: Cancel within 7 days for full deposit back as in-store credit
partyPackages.bookingAdvice: Book 2-4 weeks in advance — weekends fill quickly

playAreas: Multi-level space station with cosmic slides and interactive mission zones
5 slides — gentle slopes to fast drops for all ages
Toddler Galaxy — safe area for ages 1-4: soft ball pit, gentle slide, interactive supermarket, role-play police station, padded play area

cafe.description: Order from your seat with full view of the play area
cafe.dietary: Veggie pizza available. More vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options coming soon.
cafe.allergens: Allergen info available online. Notify staff of allergies when ordering.

faqs.a: We're open Monday–Thursday 10am–9pm and Friday–Sunday 10am–10pm, 7 days a week!
Party room bookings are open now! General walk-in admission is coming soon. Stay tuned — we'll announce it on our Instagram @astrosplaylandcafe.
We're at 140 E Rawson Ave Suite 116, Oak Creek, WI 53154.
All-day admission is $18.99 per child (no time limits!). 2 adults get in FREE per play pass, and additional adults are $4.99 each. Kids under 1 are always free.
Yes! All guests need Astro socks. They're $3.99 at the front desk or you can bring your own clean socks.
Nope! It's all-day admission. Stay as long as you want — no time limits. Just no re-entry if you leave.
We're designed for kids aged 1–12. We have a dedicated Toddler Galaxy for our littlest explorers (ages 1–4) and bigger structures like the spider web climb and slides for older kids (ages 5+).

Yes! We have a full cafe — pizza (cheese, veggie, or beef), chicken tenders, fries, coffee, lattes, and teas. Menu items range from $5–$20. You can order right from your seat while watching the kids play.
No outside food or drinks are allowed, except birthday cake for parties. We have a great menu to keep everyone fueled up!

faqs.q: Can I book a birthday party?
faqs.a: Absolutely! We have two private party rooms — the Rocket Room and the Galaxy Room. Parties are $300 Mon–Thu and $400 Fri–Sun. Each package includes 2 hours in a private room, 2 pizzas, 2 pitchers of lemonade, 10 play passes, Astro socks for 10 kids, and all the setup. We recommend booking 2–4 weeks in advance — weekends go fast!

faqs.q: How many people can come to a party?
faqs.a: Each party room fits up to 30 guests (kids and adults combined).

faqs.q: Can I bring my own cake?
faqs.a: Yes! Birthday cake is the only outside food permitted. Bring the cake, we handle everything else.

faqs.q: What is your cancellation policy for parties?
faqs.a: Cancel within 7 days of booking and you'll receive your full deposit back as in-store credit.
Yes, all participants must complete a waiver before play. You can sign online at https://waiver.roller.app/astrosplaylandandcafe or at the front desk when you arrive.
Yes! Our monthly membership is $39.99 per child per month and includes unlimited visits, cafe discounts, and a buddy pass to bring a friend twice per month. Cancel anytime, no fees.
Yes! Visit https://www.astrosplaylandcafe.com/ for booking, party info, and more. You can also follow us on Instagram @astrosplaylandcafe.

reactivation.discountText: We'd love to have your family back for another cosmic adventure!
